sentences.arabic: قَضَيْتُ يَوْمًا جَمِيلًا عَلَى شَاطِئِ الْبَحْرِ الْأَبْيَضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ.
sentences.translation: Proveo sam lijep dan na obali Sredozemnog mora.
sentences.translationEn: I spent a beautiful day on the Mediterranean coast.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَأْجَرْتُ كُرْسِيًّا وَمِظَلَّةً صَغِيرَةً لِلاِسْتِرَاحَةِ فِي الظِّلِّ.
sentences.translation: Iznajmio sam stolicu i mali suncobran da se odmorim u hladu.
sentences.translationEn: I rented a chair and a small umbrella to rest in the shade.

sentences.arabic: سَبَحْتُ فِي الْمَاءِ الصَّافِي وَأَنَا أَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Plivao sam u bistroj vodi i osjećao sam se opušteno.
sentences.translationEn: I swam in the clear water and felt very relaxed.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ أَكَلْتُ سَمَكًا طَازَجًا فِي مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Poslije podne sam jeo svježu ribu u maloj restoranu na plaži.
sentences.translationEn: In the afternoon I ate fresh fish at a small beach restaurant.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْغُرُوبُ فَوْقَ الْبَحْرِ مَنْظَرًا لَا أَنْسَاهُ.
sentences.translation: Zalazak sunca nad morem bio je prizor koji neću zaboraviti.
sentences.translationEn: The sunset over the sea was a sight I will never forget.
